title: Extract First Name
description: Write a SQL query to fetch only the first name from the FullName column.
checklist: Extract the substring before the first space
Use CHARINDEX or equivalent string function
detailedInstructions: Step 1: Select the first name from FullName
Step 2: Use CHARINDEX to find the first space
Step 3: Use LEFT to return the substring
Step 4: Return the result as FirstName
starterCode:
-- 1: Select the first name from FullName
-- 2: Use LEFT and CHARINDEX
-- 3: Return FirstName

hints.guide: Select the first name from FullName
hints.code: SELECT LEFT(FullName, CHARINDEX(' ', FullName + ' ') - 1) AS FirstName
